positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a howling wolf and a crescent moon embracing, composed centrally with strong negative space. The wolf should have clean, graphic silhouettes and geometric patterns forming its fur. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, muted gold, and stark white ink, giving it a vintage celestial map engraving aesthetic. High contrast, clean vector art style, perfect for apparel printing, no gradients, detailed outlines, centered composition, symmetrical balance, art deco influence, forest night vibes, detailed linework.
